hero.designNotes: A full-viewport luxury Gujarati wedding hero built entirely with CSS decoration — no images required. The layout uses a three-column grid: two flanking ornamental columns (mandala rings with slow CSS rotation, diya flame-flicker animations, and toran drop pendants) bracket a bold typographic center column. The background is a warm saffron-ivory radial gradient layered with an SVG grain texture and soft amber/crimson radial glows for depth. Kavya and Mihir's names are rendered in large Playfair Display italic with a gold-ochre gradient text treatment. An animated shimmer CTA button, glassmorphism venue card, event-category pill badges, a Shri Ganesh OM badge, and floating ✦ petal particles complete the premium feel. The palette — warm amber, deep saffron, burnt sienna, ivory — is culturally resonant with a Gujarati Hindu celebration while feeling modern and editorial. Fully responsive: side columns collapse at 640px, typography fluidly scales, and all decorative elements adapt gracefully at 900px breakpoint.
